experience.highlights: Managing SQL databases, Docker environments, and Postman API testing. Running stored procedures, database updates, complex troubleshooting, creating technical guides, and providing staff training.

Transformed UEA's desktop infrastructure across 8,000+ devices, achieving 60% faster deployments through SCCM and JAMF automation. Developed PowerShell automation eliminating 20+ weekly manual hours while maintaining 99.9% system availability. Led Windows 11 migration for 2,000+ users and currently spearheading remote learning infrastructure modernisation supporting 15,000+ students.

Led global deployment of AI-powered heat-sensing CCTV across 10+ international offices during COVID-19 while managing £500K infrastructure budget. Optimised JAMF/SCCM workflows reducing new employee setup time by 65% and MacBook provisioning from 4 hours to 45 minutes. Authored comprehensive return-to-work technical documentation achieving full compliance across all locations. Provided in house support by way of the techbar.

Initially hired as a Service Desk Engineer, promoted to Desk Side Engineer within three months for consistently exceeding SLAs. Developed and implemented PowerShell automation framework for AD management and user provisioning. Designed and deployed enhanced GPO structure improving security compliance by 65%. Led successful bank-wide RSA token rollout with zero service disruption.

Provided remote and desk side support across the UK for companies in liquidation. Involved in P2V-ing machines and migrating entire infrastructure on site. Assisted in the extraction and sorting of 200TB of data from BHS. Specialised in Digital Forensics, Physical to Virtual migrations, and Ethical hacking.
Quickly promoted and responsible for running various IT departments for an MSP. Reporting directly to the CEO. Responsible for effectively balancing the business's needs with its IT capability.
Providing onsite/telephone assistance to companies such as British Transport Police, Gepp & Son’s, private legal & financial firms and sole traders.
